desc: Join Fred and Dave in transforming a military Unimog into low range for a big truck show.

desc: Witness the crew upgrading a '67 Chevy Camaro transmission from two-speed to four-speed.

desc: Mechanics restore, modify, and transform classic cars with creativity, skill, and determination while overcoming obstacles and time pressures in high-stakes challenges.
